name: Curried Chicken Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (generous) quartered (or halved) seedless grapes (red or green)
1/3 cup sweet pickle relish (or bread and butter pickles, minced fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine chicken, rice, celery, grapes, pecans and pickle relish.
2. In a small bowl, mix together mayonnaise, curry powder, salt and pepper.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Add the dressing to the chicken mixture.
5. Stir until all ingredients are evenly coated.
6. Cover and chill for at least several hours.
7. If the salad seems a little too dry, add a bit more mayonnaise.
8. Garnish with grapes, strawberries, pineapple pieces - whatever.
To toast pecans:
Spread in a shallow baking pan. Bake in a 300 degree oven for about 10 minutes. Stir once.
